title: Update Questions Form Colors and Add Success Message

requirements.summary: Change questions form section colors to burgundy and white color scheme
acceptanceCriteria: The questions form section uses burgundy (guindo) as the primary accent color
White is used appropriately for backgrounds and contrast
The color scheme is consistent with burgundy and white theme
All form elements (inputs, buttons, labels) follow the new color palette

file_operations.description: Add burgundy color definition to the theme colors extending the existing OKLCH color system to support guindo (burgundy) variants for primary, accent, and complementary shades

Update the QuestionsForm component styling to use burgundy color classes for the section background, form container, input fields borders and focus states, labels, submit button, and ensure white is used for text and background contrast where appropriate

requirements.summary: Display motivational success message after form submission
acceptanceCriteria: After successful form submission, a large title message appears with the text 'No se van a arrepentir de estudiar en el COBAD 35 de Gómez Farías'
The message is displayed prominently with large, readable typography
The message replaces or overlays the form upon successful submission
The messaging is motivational and encouraging in tone

file_operations.description: Update the success state rendering in QuestionsForm to display a prominent motivational message 'No se van a arrepentir de estudiar en el COBAD 35 de Gómez Farías' with large title typography (text-4xl or larger) that replaces the form content after successful submission, maintaining the burgundy and white color scheme
